title: Oscar's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Little Oscar wakes up to the gentle sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family, discovering all the warm noises that make home special.

pages.text: Oscar wakes up. Yawn! The sun is bright and golden through his window.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes stretching and yawning in his cozy bed, golden sunlight streaming through the window, wearing soft pajamas
illustration.alt: Oscar yawning and stretching in bed with morning sunlight

pages.text: Listen! Mama is in the kitchen. Sizzle, sizzle go the pancakes. Pop, pop goes the toaster.

illustration.description: A diverse family kitchen scene with Oscar, who has short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes, standing nearby as his mother cooks pancakes, golden morning light filling the room, everyone in comfortable pajamas
illustration.alt: Oscar listening to cooking sounds in the sunny kitchen

pages.text: Papa reads the newspaper. Rustle, rustle. He turns the pages slowly on this lazy morning.

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes sitting next to his father who is reading a newspaper, both in pajamas, warm sunlit living room with a gentle, unhurried atmosphere
illustration.alt: Oscar and Papa with the rustling newspaper

pages.text: Oscar claps his hands. Clap, clap! He stomps his feet. Stomp, stomp! Making happy sounds too.

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes clapping and stomping joyfully in the sunlit room, his family smiling warmly nearby, everyone still in cozy morning pajamas
illustration.alt: Oscar making happy clapping and stomping sounds

pages.text: The family sits together. Munch, munch go the pancakes. Slurp goes the milk. What a wonderful, noisy morning!

illustration.description: The whole diverse family eating breakfast together, with Oscar who has short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes enjoying pancakes, golden hour light streaming through windows, newspapers scattered on the table, everyone in pajamas looking content
illustration.alt: Oscar and family enjoying a noisy breakfast together

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes go 'sizzle, sizzle' when Mama cooks them in the kitchen.

questions.question: What does Papa do with the newspaper?
questions.explanation: Papa reads the newspaper and it makes a 'rustle, rustle' sound when he turns the pages.

questions.question: What sounds does Oscar make?
questions.explanation: Oscar makes happy sounds by clapping his hands and stomping his feet.
